LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT RICHARD TICAS' AMENDED MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AND SEEK REFUND IS AS FOLLOWS: MOTION PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6 FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $23,320 IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY OTHER RIGHTS DEFENDANT MIGHT HAVE BECAUSE LIABILITY FOR THAT AMOUNT IS NOT A TERM OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. Off Calendar Nov-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. DEFENDANT RICHARD TICAS' Motion In Support Of Motion To Enforce Settlement And Seek Refund is off calendar. Duplicate entry. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

Amended Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement And Seek Refund
Off Calendar Nov-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RICHARD TICAS' Amended Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement And Seek Refund

No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion pursuant to CCP 664.6 for entry of judgment in the amount of $23,320 is denied without prejudice to any other rights defendant might have because liability for that amount is not a term of the settlement agreement. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
